calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Vacated

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. PAUL OKEEFE, Esq. of Skane Mills LLP (tel: 415-431-4310) for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Answer To Complaint.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court clarifies that the defendant must submit for filing its amended answer to the complaint. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion for leave to file first amended answer to complaint" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Set For Trial On Jul-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
